sections.paragraph:
Original: מצדה מצודה מצוד

Transliteration: mâtsôd metsôdâh metsôdâh

Phonetic: maw-tsode'

BDB Definition:

  1. siege-works, bulwark (noun masculine)
  2. hunting implement, net (noun masculine)
  3. net (noun feminine)
  4. fastness, stronghold (noun feminine)

Origin: from H6679

TWOT entry: 1885d,1885e

Part(s) of speech:
